roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:110 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR44  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM,  CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 60 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT ATHEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT ON OCTOBER31, 2014,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT,PAROLE WAS SUSPENDED ON 9-9-2014,PAROLE IS REINSTATED AS OF 9-15-2014,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
